payload.label: side table
payload.long_description: Partial, vertical dark charcoal cylindrical side-table column with a slightly flared top rim and matte painted or ceramic surface; the object is edge-cropped on the left and bottom of the crop, sitting on the floor and appearing close to the camera (approx. 0.6 m away).
